title: SDD derived memory index (Wave 27 §26 #1)
description: Derived, disposable index over canonical `.specify/memory/*.md` decision/lesson entries. Markdown stays canonical (Constraint #9); this index is regenerable via `sdd memory index` / `sdd doctor` and is NOT committed. It powers dedup-aware selection in `sdd bridge` and collision surfacing in `sdd memory list --duplicates`.

schema_version.description: Index schema version. Increments are breaking changes; additive fields stay on v1.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the last rebuild from markdown.

source.description: Always `derived` — the markdown files remain the single source of truth.

entries.description: One normalized entry per decision/lesson discovered in the canonical markdown.

id.description: Stable identifier derived from source_file + source_anchor.

source_anchor.description: Heading slug of the entry inside its source file.

kind.description: Entry category, inferred from the source file.

title.description: Human-readable heading text of the entry.

fingerprint.description: Lowercase hex sha256 of the normalized entry body (reuses the §23 #3 hashing convention).

last_referenced_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp carried from the source file frontmatter (reuses §23 #4).

reference_count.description: Reference count carried from the source file frontmatter (reuses §23 #4).

duplicate_of.description: Id of the authoritative entry when this entry's fingerprint collides; null when this entry is authoritative or unique.
